---
title: "Modules"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Modules}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(papercheck)
```

Modules are user-created patterns for checking a paper or set of papers. They can be one of four types, using four search strategies.

## Text Search

For checks that can be done with a simple text search, you can create a module that provides the arguments to the `search_text()` function, along with report output.

```


```

## Code


## Machine Learning


## Generative AI
